mapper.select:
select count(co.course_id) from course co inner join tb_userinfo us on co.professor = us.loginID inner join course_class cc on cc.class_id = co.class_id
AND co.course_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
AND ${searchKey} LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
AND co.cos_sta_code = 1 AND co.course_isDeleted = 0
order by co.course_id desc

select co.course_id , co.title , co.start_date , co.end_date , co.content , co.notice , co.plan , co.time_code
, us.name as professor , us_sub.name as sub_prof
, ct.start_time , ct.end_time
, cc.class_name , cc.people_limit , IFNULL(sc.cnt, 0) as stu_num from course co inner join tb_userinfo us on co.professor = us.loginID inner join tb_userinfo us_sub on co.sub_prof = us_sub.loginID inner join course_time ct on ct.time_code = co.time_code inner join course_class cc on cc.class_id = co.class_id left join (select course_id, count(course_id) cnt from student_course where course_id = #{course_id} and stu_cou_sta_code = 0 group by course_id) sc on co.course_id = sc.course_id where co.course_id = #{course_id} group by co.course_id
select c.course_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.time_code from student_course sc inner join course c on sc.course_id = c.course_id where sc.loginID = #{loginID} and sc.stu_cou_sta_code in (0, -1)
mapper.delete: delete from student_course where course_id = #{course_id} and loginID = #{loginID}
mapper.select: select detail_code , detail_name from tb_detail_code where group_code = #{group_code}
